rule_metadata.name: SUSP_Fake_AMSI_DLL_Jun23_1
rule_metadata.description: Detects an amsi.dll that has the same exports as the legitimate one but very different contents or file sizes
rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth

rules.rule_text:
import "pe"

rule SUSP_Fake_AMSI_DLL_Jun23_1
{
	meta:
		description = "Detects an amsi.dll that has the same exports as the legitimate one but very different contents or file sizes"
		author = "Florian Roth"
		reference = "https://twitter.com/eversinc33/status/1666121784192581633?s=20"
		date = "2023-06-07"
		modified = "2023-06-12"
		score = 65
		id = "b12df9de-ecfb-562b-b599-87fa786a33bc"

	strings:
		$a1 = "Microsoft.Antimalware.Scan.Interface" ascii
		$a2 = "Amsi.pdb" ascii fullword
		$a3 = "api-ms-win-core-sysinfo-" ascii
		$a4 = "Software\\Microsoft\\AMSI\\Providers" wide
		$a5 = "AmsiAntimalware@" ascii
		$a6 = "AMSI UAC Scan" ascii
		$fp1 = "Wine builtin DLL"

	condition:
		uint16( 0 ) == 0x5a4d and ( pe.exports ( "AmsiInitialize" ) and pe.exports ( "AmsiScanString" ) ) and ( filesize > 200KB or filesize < 35KB or not 4 of ( $a* ) ) and not 1 of ( $fp* )
}

rule_metadata.name: SUSP_Fake_AMSI_DLL_Jun23_2
rule_metadata.description: Detects an amsi.dll that has very different contents or file sizes than the legitimate
rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth

rules.rule_text:
rule SUSP_Fake_AMSI_DLL_Jun23_2
{
	meta:
		description = "Detects an amsi.dll that has very different contents or file sizes than the legitimate"
		author = "Florian Roth"
		reference = "https://twitter.com/eversinc33/status/1666121784192581633?s=20"
		date = "2023-06-07"
		modified = "2023-06-14"
		score = 65
		id = "adec9525-6299-52d5-8f4e-a83366d3dcfd"

	strings:
		$a1 = "Microsoft.Antimalware.Scan.Interface" ascii
		$a2 = "Amsi.pdb" ascii fullword
		$a3 = "api-ms-win-core-sysinfo-" ascii
		$a4 = "Software\\Microsoft\\AMSI\\Providers" wide
		$a5 = "AmsiAntimalware@" ascii
		$a6 = "AMSI UAC Scan" ascii
		$fp1 = "Wine builtin DLL"

	condition:
		uint16( 0 ) == 0x5a4d and filename == "amsi.dll" and ( filesize > 200KB or filesize < 35KB or not 4 of ( $a* ) ) and not 1 of ( $fp* )
}
